name: Wilgert Hart
title: Founder & Managing Partner
executive: Wilgert Hart is founder and managing partner of Start to Scale Financial Management. He spent nearly three decades in senior finance, including CFO roles at Hill & Knowlton (WPP's global communications firm) and earlier finance roles at EMI Music Netherlands and Warner Music Benelux. He brings that operator's experience to Dutch scale-ups, taking a growing company's finance function from informal to fully professional and running it until a permanent CFO takes over.
technical: Wilgert Hart's career spans 13 finance roles over nearly 30 years, centred on professional-services and media businesses operating under continuous growth and restructuring pressure. As CFO Netherlands and CFO Europe & Netherlands at Hill & Knowlton (WPP), he ran the finance function for one of the world's largest communications firms — covering budgeting, group reporting, financial operations, internal controls, and board-level financial planning. Earlier roles as Finance Manager at EMI Music Netherlands and Assistant Controller at Warner Music Benelux built his grounding in financial operations and commercial finance inside fast-moving organisations. His expertise covers financial management of professional-services firms, budgeting and forecasting, financial reporting and group reporting, financial operations and internal controls, strategic financial planning, and business and financial analysis.
short: Wilgert Hart — nearly 30 years in senior finance, CFO at Hill & Knowlton (WPP), EMI Music and Warner Music background, now fractional/interim CFO for NL scale-ups
